title: Domain
content:
Domain
 is a method cultivators from 
Sealed Realm
 used to start the comprehending world aspects. To attain the 
Soul Transformation
 stage, cultivators need to comprehend a world aspect, preferably the most they are familiar with, be it from self-experience or cultivating a domain technique their ancestors practiced.

Cultivation
[
]

Method
[
]

Cultivators at the 
Nascent Soul
 stage begin to assimilate themselves into mortal life so they can find an epiphany for the domain they seek. After Soul Transformation, to improve their domain, the cultivator can choose to further comprehend the domain by themselves or devour another cultivator's domain with similar attributes. The first method ensures stability while improving the domain. The second method has a risk of mutating or changing the domain they originally cultivated into a fusion of two different domains.

Completion
[
]

There are two known paths when the domain reaches completion, the first one is Wang Lin's case, he still retains completed domains after they are completed while he starts to comprehend a new domain. The other case is Liu Mei with her Ruthless Domain which completely evolved into a higher version of that domain after it reached completion.

At the 
Nirvana Shatterer
 level, a cultivator can use their insight into 
Law
 to evolve their domain(s) into an 
Essence
. From the Essence perspective, a Domain can be viewed as an inferior version of an Essence and also can be said as an Essence seed.
